title: 6PCS Dummy Case Pacifier Storage Box Pacifier Case Transparent Pacifier Case Soothers Pod Storage Box Travel and Family Use Pacifier Holder Newborn Dummies for Holding Pacifiers
features: 【Size】The size of dummy case is 70X 61mm X 51mm. The size and shape are perfect for any shape of pacifier.
【Material】This dummy steriliser is made of high-quality materials, which comply with food safety and bring your child a healthier and safer life.

【Easy to clean】Our dummy box lids can be cleaned with a dishwasher and hand washing is also very convenient and fast, making them very easy to clean. The housing of dummy cases for babies is tightly sealed, but mam newborn dummies is also easy to open by gently squeezing the side of the housing.

【Transparent design】The pacifier case adopting a sealed and tightly fastened design helps protect the pacifier from dust, dirt, debris, and bacteria. The transparent design makes dummy cover easy for you to recognize internal contact, which will bring you great convenience and keep the pacifier cleaner.

【Widely applicable】The portable dummy steriliser is suitable for baby pacifiers at home and during travel. Compact in size, easy to carry when going out, and can safely store pacifiers and small teeth inside.
